resource_role: Protein metadata, function, taxonomy, sequence, and cross-references

evidence_boundary.can_support: Traceable protein accession, reviewed/unreviewed status, sequence, and annotation metadata.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: New functional proof, mechanism, causality, or clinical utility without primary evidence.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
